title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 233.050 - Board of commissioners of special road district to organize
text:
233.050.  Board of commissioners of special road district to organize. — Such special road district commissioners shall, within ten days, meet and organize by selecting one of their number as chairman and one as clerk.  The clerk shall keep full and accurate record of the proceedings of the board, and perform such other duties as may be required of him by the board.
(RSMo 1939 § 8678, A.L. 1993 S.B. 236) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8029; 1919 § 10805; 1909 § 10581
